title: StoryTimeEvent
description: A story-time event on the timeline of a Novel (Spec 128). Scenes link to it via HAPPENS_AT; the disclosure point links via REVEALED_IN.

label.description: Short human-readable label for the event.

when_story.description: Story-time position — a date, period, or relative marker (e.g. 'Year 3 of the war', 'Day 0').

when_narrative.description: Narrative-time position — when the reader encounters this in the text.
